metadata.title: OMA Digital — AI Automation Agency in Senegal
metadata.description: OMA Digital, your digital agency specializing in website creation, mobile apps and AI automation in Senegal.
metadata.keywords: digital agency Senegal, website creation, mobile app, AI automation

hero.title: Automate your business
hero.subtitle: Premium websites, mobile apps and AI automation solutions to propel your Senegalese business towards digital success.

problemSolution.p1Desc: You spend hours on repetitive tasks that could be automated.
problemSolution.p2Desc: Your business is invisible online, you miss potential clients every day.
problemSolution.p3Desc: Your competitors move forward with technology while you fall behind.
problemSolution.s1Desc: AI handles your repetitive tasks — you focus on growth.
problemSolution.s2Desc: A premium website and apps that convert visitors into clients.
problemSolution.s3Desc: Stay ahead with cutting-edge technology solutions.

services.sectionSubtitle: Complete digital solutions to transform your business.
services.websiteDesc: Showcase sites, e-commerce and modern web apps, fast and SEO-optimized.
services.mobileDesc: Custom iOS and Android apps to connect your business with clients everywhere.
services.aiDesc: Smart chatbots, workflow automation and AI solutions for your productivity.

caseStudies.sectionSubtitle: See how we've transformed Senegalese businesses.
caseStudies.challenge1: Physical store in Saly without online presence, losing sales to digital competition.
caseStudies.solution1: Full e-commerce site with Wave/Orange Money payment, AI chatbot and automation.
caseStudies.challenge2: Manual appointment management causing errors and patient losses.
caseStudies.solution2: Mobile appointment booking app with automatic reminders.
caseStudies.challenge3: Entirely manual export process with paper-based order tracking.
caseStudies.solution3: Full AI automation: custom CRM, real-time tracking, automated reports.

testimonials.quote1: OMA Digital completely transformed our online presence. Our revenue tripled in 6 months.
testimonials.quote2: The appointment app revolutionized our clinic. Our patients love the simplicity.
testimonials.quote3: Their automation solution saved us over 20 hours per week.
